title: dorycnium suffruticosum subsp. jordanianum
intro: Dorycnium suffruticosum subsp. jordanianum, also known as the Jordanian knapweed or lesser knapweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and flowers of Dorycnium suffruticosum subsp. jordanianum are used in herbal preparations, including infusions and tinctures, which have been traditionally used to relieve pain and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions.
